CustomField.formula: IF ( leaseworks__Long_Term_Commitment_Credit_Memorandum__c, (leaseworks__Airframe_Net_Base_Price__c * leaseworks__Escalation_Airframe__c)+(leaseworks__Engine_Net_Base_Price__c * leaseworks__Escalation_Engine__c ) -(leaseworks__Aircraft_Base_Price__r.leaseworks__Customer_Support_Credit_Memorandum__c * leaseworks__AircraftPriceIndex__c) - (leaseworks__Aircraft_Base_Price__r.leaseworks__Long_Term_Commitment_Credit_Memorandum__c * leaseworks__AirframeCredit__c ) , (leaseworks__Airframe_Net_Base_Price__c * leaseworks__Escalation_Airframe__c) +( leaseworks__Engine_Net_Base_Price__c * leaseworks__Escalation_Engine__c ) -(leaseworks__Aircraft_Base_Price__r.leaseworks__Customer_Support_Credit_Memorandum__c* leaseworks__AircraftPriceIndex__c) )
CustomField.label: Discounted Price at Delivery Form
